| Chinese Sage (Salvia miltiorrhiza) Root Extract 150 mg | \\ | [...] ## Qualia Stem Cell Ingredients

### CyanthOx™ (sea buckthorn fruit extract)

CyanthOx™ is an extract from sea buckhorn fruit (native to Tibet) which has been clinically studied for supporting the mobilization of stem cell types involved in the body’s healthy self-healing and self-renewal functions, including progenitor stem cells, endothelial stem cells, and lymphocytoid mesenchymal stem cells.\

### Alomac® (Aloe macroclada extract)

Aloe macroclada is native to Madagascar,where it has been used by the Malagasy people for centuries to support natural healing and to promote rejuvenation and longevity. Alomac®, a standardized extract, has been studied for supporting healthy stem cell functions in humans, where it enhanced hematopoietic stem cells up 53%.\

### Okinawa Mozuku Extract [...] ### Astragalus root extract

Astragalus membranaceus, or Huang Qi, is a perennial herb native to northeast Asia, flourishing in dry, sandy soils and regions such as mountain thickets and vast grasslands. In Traditional Chinese Medicine it is one of the most important herbs for tonifying Qi and enhancing vitality, and is also renowned for healing and promoting healthy blood circulation. Preclinical studies suggest that Astragalus root aids healing by promoting healthy stem cell proliferation and differentiation.\

### Salvia miltiorrhiza extract [...] NucleoPrime® Nucleotides Blend Nucleotides are the complex molecules that form DNA and RNA. DNA is sometimes referred to as the "blueprint for life", and RNA translates the information stored in DNA to make the proteins and express our genes. They are essential compounds during times of tissue self-renewal so act a bit like fuel for numerous stem cell functions.\

Wellmune® soluble yeast beta glucan Wellmune® Soluble supports the body’s natural defenses. Over a dozen clinical trials demonstrate the ability of Wellmune® to help maintain a healthy immune system and support overall energy and vitality. The soluble beta-glucans in Wellmune support healthy stem cell migration, renewal, and survival mechanisms.\

## Recharge Naturally, Night After Night.

## What to Expect:

### Sleep Benefits Supported By Qualia Night

Naturally Induced Sleepiness:

No sedatives. No melatonin. Just a gradual, natural calming into effortless slumber.

Deep Regenerative Sleep:

Additional Health Benefits: [...] ### VINEATROL®20 Grapevine Extract

Grapevine shoot extract has wide-ranging health benefits for sleep (and beyond). We’ve chosen the standardized version of VINEATROL®20 Grapevine Extract because it contains at least 5% trans-resveratrol and no less than 20% resveratrol monomers and oligomers. It supports brain function and neuroprotective functions, which are key considerations when formulating for mental (and not just physical) recovery while sleeping.

### KSM-66 Ashwagandha® [...] ### Holy Basil (Ocimum sanctum) Leaf Extract

Holy Basil (Ocimum sanctum) is an aromatic herb that has been used within Ayurvedic medicine for more than 3000 years. Now categorized as an adaptogen, holy basil has been researched to support a healthy stress response, mood, cognition and immune function.

### Reishi Mushroom

Often called “the mushroom of immortality”, Ganoderma lucidum (commonly known as Reishi mushroom), has been used for centuries in Traditional Chinese Medicine under the name “Lingzhi” in shen tonic, which was used to promote peace of mind, sound sleep, and clear thinking. Modern research on reishi mushrooms also indicates support for sleep, as well as immune function.

### VINEATROL®20 Grapevine Extract [...] What is Qualia Night?

+

Qualia Night is a dietary supplement designed to support nightly relaxation, sound and refreshing sleep, and help you wake up feeling rested and ready for a new day. Qualia Night helps the brain perform all the tasks that go on while we sleep: rest, clean up, organize, recharge. By doing so, it contributes to next-day cognitive performance and long-term brain health. Qualia Night provides 25 carefully selected ingredients to support quality sleep and more productive daytimes, including L-theanine, magnesium, and Ashwagandha.\

Why Do You Recommend Taking Qualia Night 5 Days a Week, Followed by 2 Off Days?

## Qualia Probiotic+ Ingredients Table

### Supplement Facts

Serving Size: 1 scoop (10.5 g)
Servings Per Container: 20 [...] ### DigeZyme® Multi-Enzyme Compl

DigeZyme® Multi-Enzyme Complex delivers on the goal of supporting both the upper and lower GI tracts, our research led us to a multi-enzyme complex containing five digestive enzymes called DigeZyme®. It uses “microbial” or “plant-derived” enzymes giving broad enzyme support, and has been studied in humans. DigeZyme® contains five enzymes: α–Amylase to help break down starches; Cellulase to help break down plant cell walls in fruits and vegetables; Lipase to promote the breakdown of fats; Protease to help break down proteins; and Lactase to help break down the milk sugar (lactose) found in some dairy products\

## Learn More About The Other Ingredients [...] ### Fermeric™ Fermented Turmeric

Fermeric™ Fermented Turmeric  A fermented turmeric containing inactive cells of Lactobacillus plantarum. It also contains compounds and metabolites produced during fermentation. The fermentation process used to make Fermeric™ enhances the antioxidant content of the turmeric and transforms health-promoting curcuminoids into forms that can be more easily absorbed.\ We chose our suggested amount to supply one billion cells of inactivated Lactobacillus plantarum. As a postbiotic, it has been mostly studied for supporting the gut-immune axis and the health of the gut barrier.\

### Fibriss™ Organic Baobab Fruit Pulp Powder [...] ## Total Gut Support Made Easy

## Total Gut Support Made Easy

## Total Gut Support Made Easy

## What to Expect:

### Commonly Experienced Health Benefits Supported By Qualia Probiotic+

Enhanced Digestive Support

Less bloating and gassiness, healthier bowel regularity, and less general indigestion.

Mood & Mental State Benefits

Your gut, like your brain, contains neurons. Qualia Probiotic+ contains ingredients to support strengthening of the gut-brain axis.

Powerful Immune Support

70% of our immune system is in our gut. Qualia Probiotic+ promotes healthy bacteria, such as Akkermansia, a keystone gut species that aids in immune support and strengthens gut lining.

Enhanced Nutrient Absorption

Contains five powerful digestive enzymes that support healthy nutrient absorption. [...] ## Learn More About The Other Ingredients

SmartSeed™ Celastrus paniculatus Seed Extract The Celastrus paniculatus plant, also known in South Asia as “the intellect tree”, has seeds used for centuries as a brain tonic to support mental sharpness and memory. SmartSeed™ is a proprietary extract only found in Qualia products. It supports healthy acetylcholine signaling, which is an important neurotransmitter involved in attention, learning, memory, and neuroplasticity.\
